zh.lifeSummary: Martha Wombrey於1624年出生在英國。她於1645年與Thomas Lawrence在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1685年2月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德費艾費爾德享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Martha Wombrey于1624年出生在英国。她于1645年与Thomas Lawrence在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1685年2月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德費艾費爾德享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Martha Wombrey was born in 1624, in England. She married Thomas Lawrence in 1645, in Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 6 February 1685, in Fairfield, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61.

ja.lifeSummary: Martha Wombreyは1624年にイギリスで生まれた。1645年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンミルフォードでThomas Lawrenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1685年2月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドファイルフィールドで61歳で死去した。

ko.Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스타퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Martha Wombrey(은)는 1624년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1645년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 미퍼드에서 Thomas Lawrence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1685년 2월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 파어필드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Martha Wombrey nasceu em 1624, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Thomas Lawrence em 1645, em Milford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1685, em Fairfield, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Martha Wombrey родилась в 1624 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Lawrence в 1645 г. в местности милфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 февраля 1685 г. в местности феирфиелд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Martha Wombrey nació en 1624, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Thomas Lawrence en 1645, en Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1685, en Fairfield, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años.
